probes.description: Send an unknown JSON-RPC method. MCP spec requires -32601 (MethodNotFound). Returning -32602 (InvalidParams) leaks that the server dispatches by parameter shape rather than by method name, and may indicate non-conforming middleware.

assertions.description: Server MUST return -32601 MethodNotFound for unknown methods, not -32602 InvalidParams

probes.description: Unknown method in the tools namespace — must also return -32601.

remediation: Return JSON-RPC error -32601 (MethodNotFound) for all unknown methods. Returning -32602 (InvalidParams) indicates the dispatcher is pattern-matching on parameters rather than method name — a protocol non-conformance that can expose server internals and may hide dispatch bugs.
